reasoning: The candidate has 13+ years of full-stack experience, exceeding the 6+ years requirement, with consistent roles in full-stack development (re:cinq, Optilyz, GISCollective, RIDE Capital, etc.).

Primary stack matches well: TypeScript, Node.js, React (noted in Optilyz and WatchUp), and Vitest (implied by testing focus and workshops). Nest.js is missing from resume but Node.js experience is extensive.

Backend experience includes Node.js, Java, Kotlin (implied by Altom Consulting and GISCollective), and databases like MongoDB, PostgreSQL (implied by SQL), and MySQL. Cloud experience is present via AWS CDK at Optilyz.
AI agent development is explicitly mentioned in the current role at re:cinq (MCP, code generators), aligning with the secondary requirement.
Testing expertise is evidenced by workshops (Selenium, TDD) and frameworks like Vitest (implied), Jest (implied via testing culture), and Playwright (noted).
Security best practices are implied by roles in fintech/data integration (Dunnhumby) and dev-ops (Altom Consulting).
Scalability and performance are highlighted in roles like Dunnhumby (low-latency microservices) and Optilyz (pricing optimizations for millions of mails).
Collaboration with product/design is noted in roles like GISCollective and WatchUp.

Lack of explicit mention of Kubernetes (though GISCollective mentions it), and Nest.js is missing. Some roles focus on legacy stacks (e.g., C/C++ at National Instruments), which may dilute full-stack focus.
Education includes a BS in Computer Science, meeting the core qualification.
strengths: Extensive full-stack experience (13+ years) with deep TypeScript/Node.js expertise and frontend React experience.
Proven track record in scalable systems (Dunnhumby: millions of HTTP requests/sec) and AI agent infrastructure (re:cinq).
Strong testing and dev-ops culture (TDD, CI/CD, GitLab setup, Kubernetes deployments) with active contribution to OSS.
concerns: No explicit mention of Nest.js, a primary stack requirement; though Node.js experience is strong.
Limited mention of Kotlin/Java in recent roles (last clear use in 2018; current role focuses on TypeScript and AI agents).
Some roles skew toward legacy stacks (C/C++, Dlang) which may not reflect modern full-stack priorities.
response.justification: Bogdan Szabo is a highly experienced full-stack engineer with deep TypeScript/Node.js expertise, React frontend experience, and a strong focus on testing and scalability. His current role in AI agent infrastructure aligns well with emerging tech needs. While Nest.js and Kotlin/Java are not explicitly mentioned in recent roles, his Node.js and TypeScript depth compensate, and his GitCollective project demonstrates Kubernetes proficiency. The candidate’s 13+ years of experience, architectural contributions, and collaborative problem-solving make him a strong fit for a Senior Fullstack role.
